architecture.summary: Deletion-only increment. Scope fully enumerated in brainstorm. No new architecture.

integrations.summary: Removing GitHub content/commit API routes. Eval runner endpoints preserved.

ui-ux.summary: Removing /admin/evals page and nav link. No new UI.

performance.summary: N/A - pure deletion reduces surface area.

security.summary: Removing write-back-to-GitHub capability reduces attack surface.

edge-cases.summary: Must preserve eval runner endpoints. Brainstorm explicitly enumerates keep vs delete.
